heading: Emanuel Jofre Settings : Forms
accessedVia: Settings → Configuration Settings → toolbar dropdown 'Configuration Sections' → 'Forms'

criticalDateHandlingFlags.contradiction: Central Admin says V2 OFF, but runtime probe (tools/explore/probe-v1-v2-flag.js) reported VV.Form.calendarValueService.useUpdatedCalendarValueLogic=true on a bare template load. setUserInfo() is pushing V2 despite this customer-level toggle being unchecked. Either this checkbox is not the gate, or another platform/database-level override is in effect.
